category_sources: Official GitHub man page and project describe the detox filename cleanup utility.
source_facts.description: utility to replace problematic characters in filenames.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official detox project site.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README and man page provide usage documentation.
Official SourceForge homepage is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dharple/detox, so repo enrichment was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists detox and inline-detox command-line tools.
